name: hivemind-codex
description: Codex plugin for the live HIVE-MIND MCP bridge

interface.shortDescription: Live HIVE-MIND memory and research tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the live HIVE-MIND MCP bridge so it can search web intelligence, recall memories, save facts, inspect stored memories, and run research workflows from the same shared intelligence layer used by the app.
defaultPrompt: Recall what we already know about this project.
Search the web for current research context.
Save the key findings back into HIVE-MIND.
